ip_outcome_note: Card name reads 'Power of Friendship Pan'. Pan is Gohan and Videl's daughter and Goku's granddaughter, established in Dragon Ball Z and starring in Dragon Ball GT. Card trait is Saiyan/Earthling, Era: Baby Saga — consistent with Pan's GT role as one of three protagonists (Goku, Trunks, Pan) of the early GT space arc. Identity unambiguous from card name.

trivia_bullets.text: BT4-009 is a red Common Battle card: 20000 power, 5000 combo power, 5-red energy cost. Auto ability on play: look at the top 5 cards, choose up to 1 Battle Card with 15000 or less power bearing GT in the character name and play it. This is a direct tutor for GT-named cards, enabling tempo plays that chain GT characters into the field. Trait: Saiyan/Earthling, Era: Baby Saga. [Source: WebSearch snippet via TCGPlayer product page BT4-009]
sources: TCGPlayer: Power of Friendship Pan BT4-009

trivia_bullets.text: Pan is the daughter of Son Gohan and Videl, and the granddaughter of Son Goku. Being the child of a Saiyan-human hybrid (Gohan) and a fully human mother (Videl), Pan is a quarter-Saiyan — notable as one of the few quarter-Saiyans in the franchise. In Dragon Ball GT, she is one of three main characters sent into space to retrieve the Black Star Dragon Balls. [Source: WebSearch snippet via dragon-ball-official.com character showcase]

Pan notably cannot achieve Super Saiyan form in Dragon Ball GT despite her Saiyan heritage, a creative decision that has generated ongoing fan discussion. Her role in BT4's Baby Saga era cards reflects the period when Baby targeted and possessed most of the Z-Fighters — Pan was one of few who evaded possession. [Source: WebSearch snippets via Dragon Ball official site character notes; Wikipedia: Dragon Ball GT]
